# OptionWise (homepage)

OptionWise is a B2B platform for companies and equity advisors to manage employee stock option and warrant programmes in Sweden. It reduces manual administration and improves communication. A free employee companion app helps participants understand grants, vesting, and key dates.

Publisher: TangCai Invest AB (brand: OptionWise).
Contact: info@tangcai.se

## Primary actions

- Book a demo: use the "Book a demo" control on the site (mailto or calendar URL depending on deployment).
- Log in: https://optionwise.se (override with `VITE_B2B_APP_URL` at build time).
- Employee app (same listings as OptionWiseB2BPlatform email templates): App Store `https://apps.apple.com/se/app/optionwise/id6747363629?l=en-GB`, Google Play `https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.optionwise.app`.

## In-page sections (anchors)

- #platform — platform overview for companies, employees, and advisors
- #challenge — problem / "The challenge"
- #for-companies — companies card
- #employee-app — employee app card
- #for-advisors — advisors card
- #demo — final call-to-action (Book a demo)
- #contact — contact / email block in the footer

## Machine-readable structured data

This site exposes JSON-LD (Organization, WebSite, SoftwareApplication) in the HTML when rendered.

## Optional public URL

When the site is deployed with a stable origin, set `VITE_SITE_URL` at build time so canonical, Open Graph, and Twitter image URLs resolve to absolute links.
